title: StopServiceResponse
description: Station response to a StopServiceRequest, reporting actual usage and charges when the service is successfully stopped.

status.description: Result of the stop service request.

actualDurationSeconds.description: Actual duration the service ran in seconds. Present when status is Accepted.

creditsCharged.description: Credits charged for the completed session. Present when status is Accepted.

meterValues.description: Optional metering data collected during the session.

errorCode.description: Numeric error code. Present when status is Rejected.

errorText.description: Human-readable error description. Present when status is Rejected.

finalSeqNo.description: Optional canonical session-final marker — the highest seqNo emitted for this session by the station. Present when status is Accepted and the station has emitted at least one session-scoped EVENT (MeterValues) with seqNo. Servers MUST discard any MeterValues with seqNo > finalSeqNo received after this StopService RESPONSE for the same sessionId. See spec/02-transport.md §3.2.
